notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee grounds into a double play, first baseman Matt Olson to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson. Victor Bericoto out at 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers singles on a ground ball to third baseman Austin Riley. Luis Arraez scores. Heliot Ramos to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Heliot Ramos scores. Rafael Devers to 3rd. Jung Hoo Lee to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Eli White reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Matt Chapman.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers singles on a ground ball to third baseman Austin Riley. Luis Arraez scores. Heliot Ramos to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman Austin Riley.

notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Heliot Ramos scores. Rafael Devers to 3rd. Jung Hoo Lee to 2nd. Throwing error by second baseman Ozzie Albies.

notableEvents.detail: Eli White reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Matt Chapman.

notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith singles on a ground ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert, deflected by shortstop Casey Schmitt.
